title: Harmony Distillery: A taste sensation in a new location
description: BUSINESS NEWS - You can take delight in...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - You can take delight in Harmony Distillery's brand-new, breath-taking location at Misty Valley Farm this weekend, while enjoying your favourite premium gin from Harmony's excellent selection.


> Tomorrow, Saturday 30 November, Harmony Distillery is opening the doors of its new premises at Misty Valley Farm, only six kilometres outside Hartenbos.


Harmony is inviting your family and friends to a day filled with fun, laughter and the chance to forge magical memories.

Misty Valley Farm is on the R328 towards Oudtshoorn. It offers spectacular views of rolling hills and is a serene escape into nature, where you can enjoy Harmony Distillery's perfectly distilled gin and also relish Misty Valley Farm's delicious wood-fired pizzas.

So, get ready for a day of adventure with your loved ones at Harmony Distillery and Misty Valley Farm, which have the ultimate blend of flavours and vibes.

The distillery is open tomorrow and Sunday from 08:00 until 20:00.

For more information, call Harmony Distillery (079 895 2394) or Misty Valley Farm (079 888 2957). You can also visit their Facebook pages, Harmony Distillery and Misty Valley Farm.

Facebook:

- FB: Harmony Distillery
- Mistey Valley Farm

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
